mxCell.value: GRASP: Controller ApprovalController handles all approval system events. Facade Controller pattern.
GRASP: Information Expert VisitorRepository holds all visitor/approval data – expert for validation & persistence.
GRASP: Creator ApprovalController records and initiates Approval objects. GoF: Factory Method used.
GoF: Singleton QRCodeService is a single shared service instance across the system.

1: createApproval
(visitorName, category, purpose, visitDate, timeWindow, duration)
GRASP: Controller Handles modifyApproval system event. Session Controller per use case.
GRASP: Information Expert ApprovalRepository holds approval data – expert for fetch, validate & update.
GRASP: Information Expert Approval knows its own state and enforces its own update rules.
GoF: Singleton QRCodeService single instance; invalidates old QR, issues new one.
GRASP: Controller ApprovalController receives cancelApproval event. Session Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert ApprovalRepository has all approval state data needed for cancellation.
GRASP: Information Expert Approval manages its own status transition to CANCELLED state.
GoF: Observer NotificationService notifies visitor on cancellation. Publisher-subscriber model.
GRASP: Controller GateController handles arrival approval event. Facade Controller.
GoF: Observer NotificationService pushes arrival alert to Resident. Publisher-subscriber.
GRASP: Information Expert ApprovalRepository stores and retrieves approval state for guard & resident.
GRASP: Controller GateController receives rejectVisitor system event. Facade Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert ApprovalRepository knows visitor status & persists rejection records.
GRASP: Creator GateController creates EntryLog – it records all gate events (contains them).
GRASP: Controller ReportController handles viewVisitorHistory event. Session Controller per UC.
GRASP: Information Expert EntryLogRepository holds all entry/exit records – expert for history queries.
GoF: Strategy ReportGenerator applies different export strategies (PDF, CSV) at runtime.

%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22rounded%3D0%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfillColor%3D%23b1ddf0%3BstrokeColor%3D%2310739e%3B%22%20value%3D%22%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%2260%22%20width%3D%2210%22%20x%3D%22632.5%22%20y%3D%22720%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E
GRASP: Controller GateController receives verifyApproval event. Facade Controller.
GoF: Singleton QRCodeService is shared single instance used for all QR decode/validate.
GRASP: Information Expert ApprovalRepository holds all approval data for status validation.
GRASP: Creator GateController creates EntryLog as it records all verification events.
GRASP: Controller GateController handles registerVisitorEntry event. Facade Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert ApprovalRepository holds approval data needed to validate visitor entry.
GRASP: Creator GateController creates EntryLog. It records and initiates entry events.
GoF: Observer OccupancyDashboard is subscribed observer – updated on each entry.
GRASP: Controller GateController handles registerVisitorExit event. Facade Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert EntryLogRepository has occupancy data – expert for finding active entries.
GRASP: Information Expert EntryLog knows its own entry timestamp and can set its own exit time.
GoF: Observer OccupancyDashboard is observer – notified on exit to remove from list.
GRASP: Controller GateController handles registerResidentEntry. Facade Controller.
GoF: Singleton QRCodeService is shared single instance for all QR verification calls.
GRASP: Information Expert ResidentRepository holds resident profile data for authentication & lookup.
GoF: Observer OccupancyDashboard is observer – updated on every resident entry.
GRASP: Controller GateController handles registerResidentExit. Facade Controller.
GoF: Singleton QRCodeService single shared instance for all QR decode operations.
GRASP: Information Expert ResidentRepository holds resident status – expert for entry record lookup.
GoF: Observer OccupancyDashboard observes exit events and removes resident from live list.
GRASP: Controller AdminController handles defineAccessRules event. Session Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert RuleRepository holds all existing rules – expert for conflict detection.
GRASP: Creator AdminController creates AccessRule – it records and initiates rules.
GoF: Strategy RuleValidator applies different validation strategies per rule type.
GRASP: Controller AdminController handles monitorOccupancy event. Session Controller.
GoF: Observer OccupancyDashboard is central publisher – pushes real-time updates to admin.
GRASP: Information Expert EntryLogRepository holds all active entries – expert for occupancy queries.
GRASP: Information Expert RuleRepository provides duration rules to detect overstay violations.
<font style="font-size: 11px;">[for each active entry in occupancy list]</font>
<font style="font-size: 14px;">SD-14: Review Violations And Take Action</font>
GRASP: Controller AdminController handles reviewViolations event. Session Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert ViolationRepository holds all violation data – expert for fetch & update.
GRASP: Information Expert Violation knows its own type and manages its own action state transitions.
GoF: Observer NotificationService notifies guards and residents of admin action taken.
GRASP: Controller AdminController handles blacklistVisitor event. Session Controller.
GRASP: Information Expert VisitorRepository holds visitor status – expert for blacklist checks.
GRASP: Creator AdminController creates BlacklistRecord – it records all blacklist decisions.
GoF: Observer NotificationService notifies all guards instantly when blacklist is updated.
